limitations: Searched nulls are top-selected fields, not random or bottom-ranked controls.
Non-I41 positives establish discovery geometry but are not ZTF source-aligned.
The I41 subset is too small for coefficient fitting or probability calibration.
Pairwise AUC is a diagnostic ordering statistic, not discovery-yield validation.
Exact coefficients are explicit operator priors, not fitted literature coefficients.
This policy must be calibrated against leakage-safe historical discovery or recovery outcomes before Phase 2 can close.
The policy is deterministic and explainable but is not a calibrated probability model.
